raw_cv_text:
Sérgio Makhambetov
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: sergio.makhambetov@outlook.com | LinkedIn: sérgio-makhambetov | GitHub: SérgioMakhambetov |
https://makhambetov.dev
EDUCATION
ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology) | M.S. Computer Science 2013 - 2015
Completed thesis on distributed consensus algorithms, achieving 92% optimization in Byzantine fault tolerance
simulation
Led computer science student association with 300+ active members, organizing 8 technical workshops annually
University of Waterloo | B.A.Sc. Software Engineering 2009 - 2013
Graduated with distinction; maintained 3.8/4.0 GPA in core CS courses
Co-founded university's competitive programming club, growing participation from 15 to 120 members over 3 years
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Staff Software Engineer, Payments Platform 2021 - Present
Architected distributed payment processing system handling 50M+ transactions daily across 135+ countries, reducing
latency by 35% and saving $2.3M annually in infrastructure costs
Led team of 6 senior engineers to rebuild core settlement engine, decreasing reconciliation errors by 99.7% and
preventing $18M in customer disputes
Mentored 12 junior and mid-level engineers, with 8 promoted to senior roles within 18 months; established quarterly
technical leadership program
Cloudflare | Senior Staff Engineer, Edge Network Infrastructure 2018 - 2021
Designed and deployed next-generation edge caching layer processing 1.5 trillion requests monthly, improving cache hit
ratio from 68% to 91% and reducing customer latency by 42%
Spearheaded migration of 500+ critical services to new networking stack, eliminating 15 years of technical debt and
reducing operational incidents by 78%
Drove adoption of structured logging across 200 microservices using custom distributed tracing platform, improving
MTTR for production issues from 45 minutes to 8 minutes
Notion | Staff Software Engineer, Real-Time Collaboration 2016 - 2018
Built conflict-free replicated data type (CRDT) engine supporting collaborative editing for 2M+ concurrent users,
achieving sub-100ms sync latency
Optimized WebSocket message protocol, reducing bandwidth consumption by 67% and supporting 40% more concurrent
connections on same infrastructure
Designed and implemented observability stack processing 200M events daily, enabling oncall engineers to diagnose 95%
of critical issues within first 5 minutes
Palantir Technologies | Senior Software Engineer, Data Integration Platform 2014 - 2016
Led architectural redesign of ETL pipeline to support petabyte-scale data ingestion, improving throughput by 560% and
reducing processing time from weeks to hours
Built query optimization engine leveraging cost-based planning, accelerating customer analytic queries by average of 3.2x
across 50+ enterprise deployments
Mentored 4 new engineers in distributed systems concepts; improved code review standards, reducing production bugs by
53%
PROJECTS
Meridian - Distributed Query Engine | Rust, C++, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, Arrow 2019 - Present (Open Source)
Open-source columnar query engine achieving 4.8x performance improvement over Apache Spark for analytical
workloads, with 3,200+ GitHub stars and 45+ active contributors
Implemented adaptive query planning with ML-based cost estimation, improving query time prediction accuracy from
61% to 94%
CryptoWatch - Blockchain Event Monitor | Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, GraphQL 2017 - 2019
Engineered real-time blockchain transaction monitoring system processing 450K events/second with 99.99% uptime
across 15 global nodes
Reduced false-positive alerts by 89% through implementation of machine learning anomaly detection model trained on 2
years of historical data
EXTRACURRICULAR
Systems Research and Engineering Community (SREC) | Founding Organizer & Speaker 2019 - Present
Founded and grew distributed systems meetup to 1,200+ active members across 3 cities, hosting 18+ technical talks
annually from industry leaders
Delivered 5 keynote presentations on distributed consensus and fault tolerance to audiences of 200+ engineers
Open Source Contributions & Mentorship | Core Contributor & Mentor 2015 - Present
Contributed 340+ commits to high-profile open source projects (LLVM, Kubernetes, Protocol Buffers) with focus on
performance optimization
Mentored 8 junior developers entering tech industry, with 100% placement rate at tier-1 companies; designed curriculum
for distributed systems fundamentals
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Rust, Go, C++, Java, Python, TypeScript, SQL
Technologies – Distributed Systems, Microservices Architecture, CRDT/Real-time Collaboration, gRPC, Kafka,
Elasticsearch, PostgreSQL, Redis, GraphQL, Machine Learning Systems, Stream Processing
Tools – Kubernetes, Docker, Prometheus, Grafana, Protocol Buffers, Apache Arrow, Git, CI/CD Pipelines (GitHub Actions,
Jenkins), AWS (EC2, S3, RDS), GCP (BigQuery, Bigtable)
name: Email
